overall.description: Gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a first-person walk through Night City's neon-lit streets at night. The player character walks along sidewalks beneath towering holographic billboards, crosses intersections, and moves through covered urban corridors with futuristic architecture and vibrant signage.

scene_state.functional_zone: neon-lit commercial sidewalk beneath holographic billboards

events.description: pedestrians appear walking along the sidewalk ahead
vehicle with headlights passes by on the street to the left

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk beneath a covered canopy, observing the towering neon billboards on the left

notable_agents.action: pedestrian sitting on wooden bench near the vending machine
futuristic car driving down the multi-lane street with headlights on

entered.detail: towering buildings covered with bright holographic advertisements and animated neon signage
overhanging metal structure covering the right side of the pedestrian walkway
wide asphalt road with red curbs and embedded lighting strips
simple wooden bench on the sidewalk next to a concrete planter
tall vending unit with glowing red interface and product display

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a covered urban sidewalk at night, lined with massive holographic billboards on the left building facades. The player walks forward beneath a protective canopy on the right, passing a bench and vending machine while pedestrians appear ahead and vehicles pass on the adjacent street.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban intersection beneath elevated highway with crosswalk

events.description: exiting covered sidewalk and entering open intersection with tall buildings
turning left to cross the street toward the elevated highway structure
entering the shadow cast by the massive overpass structure ahead

agents.ego_description: approaching the intersection, waiting for traffic, then crossing the street while turning left toward the covered area

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in white shirt and red cap crossing the street ahead
dark sedan stopped at the intersection waiting for pedestrians to cross

entered.detail: yellow striped pedestrian crossing marking the wide intersection
massive concrete and steel overpass casting deep shadows over the street
vertical traffic signal pole with illuminated red light
futuristic skyscraper with illuminated signage rising in the distance

segments.scene_description: The player exits the covered sidewalk into a wide urban intersection dominated by a massive elevated highway overhead. After crossing the yellow-striped crosswalk and turning left, the scene darkens as the player enters the shadow of the overpass, with a towering cylindrical skyscraper visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian corridor with neon storefronts beneath elevated highway

events.description: entering the covered corridor beneath the elevated highway structure
steam venting from industrial pipes on the left building facade

agents.ego_description: walking through the dimly lit corridor under the overpass, passing neon-lit shops and steam vents

notable_agents.action: pedestrian standing near shop entrance looking at merchandise display

entered.detail: bright green neon arrow sign pointing along the corridor
industrial steam venting from building pipes creating atmospheric haze
large illuminated billboard displaying a COLA advertisement with a beverage can

segments.scene_description: Walking beneath the massive elevated highway, the corridor is dimly lit by artificial neon lights from shop fronts. Steam vents from the left building create atmospheric haze while the player passes a prominent green neon arrow sign and a large COLA advertisement on the right wall.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial walkway with overhead pedestrian bridge approaching intersection

events.description: passing beneath a metal pedestrian bridge connecting the buildings overhead
approaching brighter area at the end of the covered corridor where natural light enters

agents.ego_description: continuing through the covered commercial area, approaching the exit to a brighter intersection

notable_agents.action: shirtless pedestrian with tattoos walking ahead in the corridor

entered.detail: metal walkway bridge with railings connecting the upper levels of buildings
industrial building with blue CHOOH2 signage and red structural elements
yellow grid-patterned pedestrian crossing at the upcoming intersection

segments.scene_description: The player continues through the covered walkway beneath a metal pedestrian bridge overhead. The corridor features various storefronts and advertisements, with a shirtless pedestrian walking ahead. The environment gradually brightens as the player approaches the exit to an open intersection with a yellow crosswalk and the CHOOH2 building visible.

scene_state.functional_zone: city street with active traffic and industrial architecture

events.description: exiting the covered corridor and turning right onto a street with moving traffic
multiple vehicles driving past on the left side of the street

agents.ego_description: turning right at the intersection and walking along the sidewalk with traffic moving on the left

notable_agents.action: black sedan driving past with headlights illuminated
pedestrian walking in the same direction along the sidewalk

entered.detail: stream of futuristic cars driving along the multi-lane road with headlights on
metal bollards lining the edge of the sidewalk separating pedestrians from the street

segments.scene_description: Exiting the covered corridor, the player turns right onto a city street with active traffic. The CHOOH2 industrial building dominates the left side while vehicles drive past on the multi-lane road. The player walks along the sidewalk bordered by traffic barriers, moving away from the covered area into the open street environment.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a neon-lit covered sidewalk through a shadowed urban underpass and back into the open city streets. It begins beneath a protective canopy lined with massive holographic billboards, moving past vending machines and pedestrians toward a wide intersection. As the camera crosses a yellow-striped crosswalk, the scene shifts into the deep shadows of a massive elevated highway, where the environment becomes a dimly lit corridor filled with atmospheric steam and glowing neon advertisements. The path then leads beneath a metal pedestrian bridge and past various storefronts before the lighting gradually brightens toward an exit. Finally, the camera emerges from the covered walkway and turns right onto a bustling multi-lane road, moving past the industrial CHOOH2 building and active traffic into the open urban environment.
